subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Thou Compassionate One! With utmost lowliness and supplication have we gathered in this spiritual assemblage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا مهربانا نفوسی در اين محفل روحانی در نهايت تبتل و تضرع حاضر شديم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @law of repetition; recitation of the Greatest Name, @service to others; to the Cause of God
